message:
refactor: rollout entry API idiom, sandbox path creation, and protocol cleanup

rollout.rs:
  Replace check-then-insert pattern with entry().or_insert_with() for
  more idiomatic and efficient map operations. Normalize test fixtures
  to use consistent "Hold" decision and "canary_scheduled" reason code
  instead of mixed Promote/Rollback states that obscured the serialization
  shape being tested. Fix rate_bps_all_failures test parameter from 100
  to 10 to match expected throughput calculation.

wasi.rs:
  Add automatic directory creation for writable_paths when the target
  path does not yet exist, preventing sandbox initialization failures
  for connector state directories that haven't been created yet. Update
  network constraint tests to use concrete service names (api.stripe.com)
  instead of generic placeholders for better test readability. Remove
  unused FixedWallClock and FixedMonotonicClock test scaffolding.

control_plane.rs:
  Remove #[allow(dead_code)] annotation from REQUIRED_PREFIXES constant
  now that it is actively referenced.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
